markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if complete Federal Register data becomes available.
markets.no_sub_title: Yes
markets.rules_primary: If the President signs above 0 executive orders during Mar 8, 2026 to Mar 14, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
An "Executive Order" is a numbered presidential directive that: is formally titled "Executive Order" followed by a number, is signed by the President, is published in the Federal Register, and has the force of law. All documents officially designated as "Executive Orders" with sequential numbering count, including Executive Orders that are later revoked or amended. 

The signing date as recorded in the Federal Register determines which period an Executive Order belongs to. If, for example, the period was "Jan 1, 2025 to Jan 7, 2025," and on January 10th the Federal Register published a numbered Executive Order with a January 7th signing date, the market would resolve to Yes. The latest Expiration Date of the Contract shall be two weeks after the end of the period. If an Executive Order that is dated past Mar 8, 2026 to Mar 14, 2026 is posted to the Federal Register, expiration may be moved to an earlier date.
markets.title: Will the President sign more than 0 Executive Orders between Mar 8, 2026 and Mar 14, 2026?

markets.rules_primary: If the number of Truth Social posts by Donald Trump from Mar 8, 2026 to Mar 14, 2026 is below 80, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The observation period begins at 12:00 AM ET on Mar 8, 2026 and ends at 11:59 PM ET on Mar 14, 2026. The primary resolution source for this market is Roll Call. In the event that Roll Call data is unavailable or inaccurate, alternative sources may be used at Kalshi's discretion. Truths, ReTruths, and Quote Truths are included in the total count. Replies are included only if captured by Roll Call. The post count will be recorded at 10:00 AM ET on Mar 15, 2026. Posts deleted as of the Expiration Time will not be included. "Between" is inclusive of the lower and upper bound.

In the event that Roll Call data is unavailable or inaccurate, alternative sources may be used at Kalshi's discretion. Truths, ReTruths, and Quote Truths are included in the total count. Replies are included only if captured by Roll Call. The post count will be recorded at 10:00 AM ET on Mar 15, 2026. Posts deleted as of the Expiration Time will not be included. "Between" is inclusive of the lower and upper bound.
markets.title: Will Donald Trump make between 140 and 159 Truth Social posts the week of Mar 8, 2026?
